Off Calendar Jan-05-2021 Continued To Jan-26-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel Distribution Of Trust Assets And Termination Of Trust; Or In The Alternative, To Compel Account And To Appoint Independent Trustee
Off Calendar Oct-27-2020 Continued To Jan-05-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Daniel Newbold appeared by zoom for Billie Hayes (Petitioner).
Donna Roberts (Trustee) appeared by telephone in Propria Persona.

Mr. Newbold stated that the current Trustee has reached out to them and he believes she has made an offer of settlement which includes a request for payment of $110,000.00 for trustee's fees for exchange of distribution of the remaining assets of the trust, that there is concern because his Client has no information regarding administration of the trust, that his Client wants the trust to be distributed and that the property is the only asset of the trust. Ms. Roberts requested a continuance stating that she has sixty documents for the Examiner to review, that distribution of the trust is premature, and that there are unpaid taxes on the property and trustee's fees. The Court stated that it is inclined to continue the matter for Ms. Roberts to submit her objections in writing, and orders Ms. Roberts to provide an accounting for the period of November 26, 2008 through November 25, 2010 (a two-year accounting) that is consistent with the Probate Code. Ms. Roberts stated that the cash gifts have been paid out and spoke of how title of the property is held. Mr. Newbold informed the Court that the property is a bar. Ms. Roberts stated that it's a bar downstairs and a residential unit upstairs. The Petition to Compel Distribution of Trust Assets, etc. is continued to January 5, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Roberts needs to file her objections by December 29, 2020. Status on filing of the accounting is set for January 5, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
